text: Useful and fast. I got the phrases I needed and immediate confirmation, but it was a bit repetitive and not as crisp as I wanted.
Useful and fast. I got the exact phrases I needed, and the confirmations helped. A couple lines felt a bit uncertain, but overall it got me ready for the meeting.
I liked the encouragement and the cultural context, but the Klingon examples felt shaky and inconsistent, so I’m left less confident than I wanted to be.
I liked the enthusiasm and the practice prompts, but the Klingon content felt pretty unreliable in places, so I’d need a cleaner, more accurate lesson to feel satisfied.

I got exactly what I was hoping for: clear nuance on Qapla', strong distinctions between honor and success, and enough pronunciation support to actually practice. The mini dialogue and call-and-response style made it feel really immersive and helpful.
I got a lot of useful Klingon honor phrases and context, and the pronunciation/rhythm feedback was really helpful, though a few constructions felt a bit inconsistent at times.
